title: thymus serpyllum var. paui
intro: Thymus serpyllum var. paui, also known as the Spanish thyme, is a variety of the thyme plant native to the Mediterranean region. This herb is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, antimicrobial, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Thymus serpyllum var. paui include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. It can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, or added to culinary dishes for flavor and nutrition.
